content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Printing some primes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://www.spoj.com/problems/TDPRIMES/
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T lines follow, each containing an integer N.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print all prime numbers less than or equal to N, separated by spaces.

solution.approach: Use the Sieve of Eratosthenes algorithm to generate prime numbers up to N.
